item.title: 🚨 TRUMP Pai SHOCKING Att@ck! | The Hilton Hotel SECURITY BREACH & Iran's 10-Min TWIST | VR Raja
item.description:
🚨 TRUMP Pai SHOCKING Att@ck! | The Hilton Hotel SECURITY BREACH & Iran's 10-Min TWIST | VR Raja
వాషింగ్టన్ లో షాకింగ్ ఎటాక్ మరియు చబహార్ పోర్ట్ లో ఇండియా వేసిన జియోపొలిటికల్ మాస్టర్ స్ట్రోక్!
For Business Inquiries & Brand Collaborations: 📧 vrfactsofficial1969@gmail.com
Ee video lo, prapanchanni okkasariga shock ki guri chesina Washington DC Hilton hotel VVIP security breach gurinchi, mariyu Donald Trump escape aina katha detail ga telusukundam. Ade time lo, Iran tho peace talks cancel chesina 10 nimishallo em jarigindi? Chabahar port sanctions nundi tappinchukovadaniki mana India vesina "Tactical Masterstroke" ento chuddam!
In this deep dive into the latest global geopolitical mind games, we cover: 🔸 The Washington Incident: How a massive security breach happened at the highly secure White House Correspondents' Dinner, causing a VVIP emergency. 🔸 The 1981 Connection: The shocking historical parallel between this event and the Ronald Reagan incident at the exact same location 45 years ago. 🔸 US vs Iran Mind Games: Why Trump abruptly canceled the Islamabad peace talks and the mysterious proposal that arrived just 10 minutes later. 🔸 Operation Economic Fury: The US Treasury's massive crackdown on the "shadow fleet" transporting resources in the Arabian Sea. 🔸 India's Chabahar Masterstroke: How the Indian government executed a brilliant geopolitical and tactical move to protect its 23-year-old strategic port investment from expiring US sanctions.
Ee global political mind games lo India vesina master plan paina mee opinion ento kinda comment cheyandi!
#VRRaja #Geopolitics #IndiaForeignPolicy #ChabaharPort #CurrentAffairsTelugu #WorldPolitics

item.title: 🙏🏻✨WHAT A CREATION #telugupodcast #rohithgollena #rrrshow
item.description:
In this engaging episode of the RRR Show, host Rohit Gollena from Lazy Muscle sits down with Lifeorama Sujith to explore the fascinating history, mysteries, and spiritual significance of the Sri Anantha Padmanabha Swamy Temple. This telugu podcast dives deep into one of the richest and most mysterious temples in India, located in Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala. Known for its hidden vaults, ancient traditions, and immense wealth, the temple continues to intrigue historians, भक्तులు, and curious minds across the world. If you are interested in Indian temples, history, spirituality, and untold stories, this episode brings you valuable insights in a simple and engaging format.
Throughout this conversation, Rohit Gollena and Lifeorama Sujith break down the origins of the Sri Anantha Padmanabha Swamy Temple, its connection to Lord Vishnu, and the significance of the deity in the Anantha Shayanam posture. The discussion also touches on the temple’s royal heritage, the Travancore kingdom, and the controversial unopened vaults that have sparked global curiosity. This RRRshow episode is designed to give listeners a balanced perspective, combining facts, cultural beliefs, and logical analysis, making it perfect for both believers and skeptics.
This lazymuscle podcast episode is crafted especially for Telugu-speaking audiences who love deep discussions, knowledge-sharing, and thought-provoking topics. Whether you are a devotee seeking spiritual understanding or someone curious about the secrets behind India’s richest temple, this episode offers something valuable for everyone. The storytelling approach keeps you hooked while delivering informative content that enhances your understanding of Indian heritage and temple architecture.
If you enjoy telugu podcast content that blends history, mystery, and meaningful conversations, don’t forget to watch till the end. Rohith Gollena brings his unique style of questioning and analysis, making this episode of RRRshow both entertaining and educational. Stay tuned for more such insightful discussions from lazymuscle, where knowledge meets curiosity in the most engaging way possible.
#telugupodcast #lazymuscle #RRRshow #rohithgollena #padmanabhaswamytemple #templemystery #indianhistory #spirituality #teluguyoutube #podcasttelugu #lifeoramasujith #hindutemples #keralatemples #richesttemple #ancientindia

item.title: Same gender s*x #telugupodcast #rohithgollena #awareness
item.description:
In this thought-provoking episode of the telugu podcast, host Rohit Gollena from lazymuscle and RRRshow sits down with Dr. G. Samaram to explore a topic that is often misunderstood, rarely discussed openly, and surrounded by myths—human connections across different orientations. Instead of approaching it with judgment, this conversation takes an educational and awareness-driven perspective, helping the Telugu audience gain clarity on how emotional and physical connections work beyond traditional norms. This episode is designed to break confusion and bring a more informed outlook to listeners who are curious but may not have access to reliable information.
As conversations around identity and relationships evolve globally, many people still struggle to understand how different individuals experience attraction, bonding, and intimacy. In this episode, Rohit Gollena guides the discussion in a way that is respectful, indirect, and easy to grasp for a wider audience. Dr. G. Samaram shares insights from a medical and psychological standpoint, helping listeners understand the natural variations in human behavior without stigma. The focus is not on sensationalism but on awareness, clarity, and responsible knowledge-sharing, which makes this episode highly relevant for today’s youth and curious minds.
This telugu podcast episode also addresses common misconceptions that arise due to lack of education and exposure. Many people rely on hearsay or incomplete information, which leads to confusion and unnecessary fear. Through this discussion, lazymuscle and RRRshow aim to provide a balanced perspective that encourages listeners to think critically and understand the science and psychology behind human connections. Rohit Gollena ensures that the conversation remains accessible, relatable, and grounded in real-world understanding.
For Telugu audiences, especially younger viewers navigating modern social dynamics, this episode serves as a valuable resource. It highlights the importance of awareness, respect, and informed thinking when it comes to topics that are often considered sensitive. By keeping the tone indirect yet insightful, the podcast maintains cultural sensitivity while still delivering meaningful information. This makes it a must-watch episode for anyone interested in understanding evolving human behaviors in a simple and non-judgmental way.
If you are looking for a telugu podcast that goes beyond surface-level discussions and dives into real, meaningful topics, this episode from lazymuscle and RRRshow hosted by Rohit Gollena is worth your time. It combines knowledge, clarity, and thoughtful conversation to help you see things from a broader perspective. Watch till the end to gain a deeper understanding and share it with others who might benefit from a more informed outlook.

item.title: dr.samaram👏🔥 #telugupodcast #rohithgollena #rrrshow
item.description:
Have you ever questioned whether what you know about relationships, attraction, and human behavior is actually true or just something society made you believe? In this deeply engaging Telugu podcast, Rohith Gollena from Lazy Muscle sits down with Dr. G Samaram, a legendary figure in health education and social reform, to break down some of the most misunderstood topics that affect today’s generation. This is not just another conversation, this is a reality check that challenges your assumptions and pushes you to think differently.
Dr. G Samaram, former National President of the Indian Medical Association, has dedicated his life to simplifying complex medical and psychological concepts for the public. In this telugu podcast, he openly talks about men’s insecurities, women’s lack of awareness in certain areas, and the deeper reasons behind emotional disconnect in relationships. His experience of decades reflects in every answer, making this podcast not only informative but also extremely practical for real life situations.
As you watch this Best Telugu Motivation Podcast style episode, you will start connecting the dots between expectations, behavior, and reality. From understanding what is considered a limit, to exploring why people feel dissatisfied or misunderstood, this telugu doccast takes you step by step into topics that are rarely explained so clearly. It feels less like a lecture and more like a conversation that speaks directly to you.
This podcast also dives into trending and often misunderstood topics like NNN, high expectations in relationships, and the importance of hygiene between men and women. Instead of giving generic advice, Dr. G Samaram explains the psychological and physical effects behind these habits and choices. This telugu creator content is designed to remove confusion and replace it with clarity, especially for young audiences who are exposed to mixed information every day.
You will also discover how connection between partners is built, why communication often fails, and what truly matters when it comes to long-term understanding. The way Rohith Gollena drives the conversation makes it engaging, relatable, and easy to follow, even when the topics get deep. This podcast is a perfect blend of knowledge, experience, and real talk that keeps you hooked from start to finish.
Lazy Muscle continues to redefine content by bringing conversations that go beyond entertainment. This Telugu Business Podcast approach focuses on value, awareness, and transformation. Whether you are trying to improve your mindset, understand relationships better, or simply gain clarity about life, this podcast gives you insights that you can actually use.

This telugu podcast is not just content, it is an experience that can genuinely shift your perspective.

మైఖేల్ జాక్సన్: ఒక లెజెండ్ వెనుక ఉన్న కన్నీటి కథ! కింగ్ ఆఫ్ పాప్ నిజంగానే క్రిమినలా?
For Business Inquiries & Brand Collaborations: 📧 vrfactsofficial1969@gmail.com
ఈ వీడియోలో, ప్రపంచాన్ని తన పాటలతో, స్టెప్పులతో ఊపేసిన మైఖేల్ జాక్సన్ (Michael Jackson) జీవితంలోని ఆసక్తికరమైన మరియు షాకింగ్ విషయాలను డీకోడ్ చేద్దాం. 2274 పాటలు, 10 సోలో ఆల్బమ్స్, 8 గ్రామీ అవార్డులు.. ఇవన్నీ ఒకెత్తయితే, ఆయన చుట్టూ ఉన్న కాంట్రవర్సీలు ఇంకో ఎత్తు.
In this deep-dive documentary, VR Raja explains: 🔸 The Brutal Childhood: How Joseph Jackson’s strictness and physical abuse shaped (and scarred) Michael. 🔸 The Apollo Breakthrough: The night at Harlem that changed the Jackson 5 forever. 🔸 Thriller Revolution: How MJ broke racial barriers on MTV and created the Moonwalk magic. 🔸 The Trauma & Injections: The shocking claims about MJ’s health and his father’s interference. 🔸 The Allegations: A detailed look at the 1993 Jordan Chandler case and the $23 Million settlement. 🔸 Neverland & Epstein: Did MJ really go to Epstein Island? The truth behind the conspiracy theories. 🔸 The Final Act: The tragic overdose of Propofol and the "This Is It" comeback dream.
MJ జీవితం ఒక అద్భుతం, కానీ అది ఒక విషాదంలో ఎలా ముగిసింది? పాప్‌కార్న్ తెచ్చుకొని కూర్చోండి, ఈ 'Not Just a Documentary' మిమ్మల్ని ఒక కొత్త లోకంలోకి తీసుకెళ్తుంది!

item.title: ‼️⚠️ MISSS AVVADDUUU… NEED OF THE HOUR | Ft @vaibhavsisinty Raw Talks With VK |
item.description:
AI Community Link: https://stayingahead.ai/vk (For all the resources and latest updates)
⚠️ Your competition already watched this. ⚠️ Vaibhav Sisinty is back for Round 2 on Raw Talks With VK and this time he is armed with not just answers but newer questions. The previous episode with Vaibhav became one of the most watched AI podcasts in Telugu. Thousands of people said it shaped how they think about their career, money, and future. In this episode we cover: - The difference between AI assistants, AI agents, and AI automation - The ADAPT Framework - Vaibhav’s Jerry: a personal AI agent that manages emails, calls, calendar, content, and brand deals - Anthropic’s Claude Mythos - OpenAI’s Industrial Policy for the Intelligence Age - Universal Basic Income vs. Universal High Income and why Elon Musk thinks money may lose its value - AI hardware revolution Meta Orion glasses, OpenAI's Dime earpiece, Alter Ego brain-wave tech, and Neuralink - AI privacy, the ChatGPT message leak, running AI locally for free, and protecting your data
The biggest AI money opportunities right now: consulting, content creation, vibe coding, and AI agents as a service
Watch this with a pen and paper. Every minute has something worth writing down.
👍 Like if this changed how you think about AI. 🔔 Subscribe to Raw Talks With VK for weekly conversations that make you curious.

item.title: 3 Types of CI/CD Pipelines EXPLAINED | What Is CI/CD Pipeline?
item.description:
In this short, I’ll break down the three most important deployment pipelines every DevOps, Cloud, or MLOps engineer should understand: Traditional CI/CD, GitOps, and MLOps pipelines.
I’ve explained how push-based CI/CD works, how GitOps uses Git as the source of truth with tools like Argo CD, and how MLOps pipelines validate data, retrain models, benchmark performance, and safely deploy AI systems.
Master all three if you want to stay relevant in this Cloud/AI era.
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/vishakha.sadhwani LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/vsadhwani/
Subscribe to my Newsletter: https://www.tech5ense.com/
-----------------------------------------------
🙋‍♀️ ABOUT ME
I’m Vishakha ☁️; A Cloud Architect and DevOps enthusiast who loves turning complex cloud concepts into simple, practical insights you can actually use. You’ll find real-world projects 💻 quick explainers ☕ and honest career advice 💬; From Kubernetes and Terraform to landing roles and building your tech brand, I keep things approachable, actionable, and a little fun so learning Cloud and DevOps actually feels exciting.
If this sounds like your vibe, hit subscribe, and let’s keep growing together 🚀

item.title: COMPLETE DevOps Project Hands-On Demo | Part 3 | Vishakha Sadhwani
item.description:
GitHub Repo: https://github.com/vishakhasadhwani/devops-ai-playbook
Complete Playlist: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLXkUFcIv0_b7rzZe0o_2-GOS2qn5-0OQy
This is Part 3 of my complete DevOps + AI end-to-end project series, where I’ll walk you through the real implementation phase as we start building and deploying our microservices-based application using modern DevOps tools.
I’ve covered how to run the project locally with Docker Compose, provision AWS infrastructure using Terraform, trigger CI pipelines with GitHub Actions, sync deployments using Argo CD, and set up an observability stack for monitoring. Also, I’ve shown how Claude Code can support modern DevOps workflows using AI tools.
This video is ideal for DevOps engineers, cloud learners, backend developers, and anyone who wants real hands-on project experience.
Watch till the end and stay tuned for Part 4, where I’ll walk you through AIOps in practice.

item.title: Telusukondi😅. #telugupodcast #rohithgollena #samaram
item.description:
Have you ever questioned whether what you know about relationships, attraction, and human behavior is actually true or just something society made you believe? In this deeply engaging Telugu podcast, Rohith Gollena from Lazy Muscle sits down with Dr. G Samaram, a legendary figure in health education and social reform, to break down some of the most misunderstood topics that affect today’s generation. This is not just another conversation, this is a reality check that challenges your assumptions and pushes you to think differently.
Dr. G Samaram, former National President of the Indian Medical Association, has dedicated his life to simplifying complex medical and psychological concepts for the public. In this telugu podcast, he openly talks about men’s insecurities, women’s lack of awareness in certain areas, and the deeper reasons behind emotional disconnect in relationships. His experience of decades reflects in every answer, making this podcast not only informative but also extremely practical for real life situations.
As you watch this Best Telugu Motivation Podcast style episode, you will start connecting the dots between expectations, behavior, and reality. From understanding what is considered a limit, to exploring why people feel dissatisfied or misunderstood, this telugu doccast takes you step by step into topics that are rarely explained so clearly. It feels less like a lecture and more like a conversation that speaks directly to you.
This podcast also dives into trending and often misunderstood topics like NNN, high expectations in relationships, and the importance of hygiene between men and women. Instead of giving generic advice, Dr. G Samaram explains the psychological and physical effects behind these habits and choices. This telugu creator content is designed to remove confusion and replace it with clarity, especially for young audiences who are exposed to mixed information every day.
You will also discover how connection between partners is built, why communication often fails, and what truly matters when it comes to long-term understanding. The way Rohith Gollena drives the conversation makes it engaging, relatable, and easy to follow, even when the topics get deep. This podcast is a perfect blend of knowledge, experience, and real talk that keeps you hooked from start to finish.
Lazy Muscle continues to redefine content by bringing conversations that go beyond entertainment. This Telugu Business Podcast approach focuses on value, awareness, and transformation. Whether you are trying to improve your mindset, understand relationships better, or simply gain clarity about life, this podcast gives you insights that you can actually use.
If you are tired of half knowledge, social media myths, and confusion around sensitive topics, this episode is exactly what you need. Watch till the end because some of the most powerful insights come in the later part of the conversation. This telugu podcast is not just content, it is an experience that can genuinely shift your perspective.
Stay connected with Lazy Muscle for more such powerful podcast conversations that bring truth, clarity, and real value to your life.

item.title: 🚨Full Fake Action adhi #telugupodcast #rohithgollena #rrrshow
item.description:
Are you truly understanding your partner, or just assuming what matters? In this insightful Telugu podcast short, Rohith Gollena from Lazy Muscle brings you a meaningful conversation with Dr. G Samaram that highlights one of the most ignored aspects of relationships today. This is not about assumptions, it is about awareness, respect, and emotional connection.
In this telugu podcast, Dr. G Samaram explains why appreciation plays a crucial role in any relationship. Many people focus only on outcomes, but forget that emotional connection, respect, and acknowledgment are the real foundations of a healthy bond. When appreciation is missing, misunderstandings grow and connection weakens. This Best Telugu Motivation Podcast segment helps you understand that small gestures and genuine respect can make a huge difference.
As the discussion goes deeper, you will realize that understanding a partner’s comfort, emotions, and needs is more important than following any fixed idea. Every individual is different, and what works for one may not work for another. This telugu Doccast emphasizes the importance of communication, patience, and mutual understanding in building a meaningful relationship.
Dr. G Samaram also talks about how many people focus only on one aspect of a relationship without realizing the importance of emotional bonding. True connection comes when both partners feel valued, heard, and respected. This telugu creator conversation encourages you to move beyond surface-level thinking and build deeper understanding.
This Telugu Business Podcast style discussion brings clarity to topics that are often misunderstood or not openly discussed. Lazy Muscle continues to create content that adds real value by addressing practical life situations with honesty and simplicity.
If you want to improve your relationship, understand your partner better, and build stronger emotional connections, this short podcast clip will give you the right perspective. Watch till the end and take away a simple but powerful message: appreciation and understanding are the real strengths of any relationship.

BUSINESS ENQUIRIES- Contact 📧 info@ayejude.com
In this video, Aye Jude explains reports of a merchant ship named Touska traveling from China to Iran that was allegedly intercepted near the Strait of Hormuz by the U.S. Navy for inspection. The ship was said to be carrying no harmful materials, but the incident has added to rising tensions in the region. Donald Trump also reacted through a social media post, while the continuing conflict has caused economic uncertainty and stock market losses in recent days. The video further discusses long-standing trust issues between the United States and Pakistan over the past decades. It also touches on trade understandings between India and Russia, along with Nepal’s new customs rule affecting Indian goods above ₹63. With trade routes, markets, and diplomacy all under pressure, could this regional crisis soon impact everyday life across Asia?

item.description:
Are you truly understanding your partner, or just assuming what matters? In this insightful Telugu podcast short, Rohith Gollena from Lazy Muscle brings you a meaningful conversation with Dr. G Samaram that highlights one of the most ignored aspects of relationships today. This is not about assumptions, it is about awareness, respect, and emotional connection.
In this telugu podcast, Dr. G Samaram explains why appreciation plays a crucial role in any relationship. Many people focus only on outcomes, but forget that emotional connection, respect, and acknowledgment are the real foundations of a healthy bond. When appreciation is missing, misunderstandings grow and connection weakens. This Best Telugu Motivation Podcast segment helps you understand that small gestures and genuine respect can make a huge difference.
As the discussion goes deeper, you will realize that understanding a partner’s comfort, emotions, and needs is more important than following any fixed idea. Every individual is different, and what works for one may not work for another. This telugu Doccast emphasizes the importance of communication, patience, and mutual understanding in building a meaningful relationship.
Dr. G Samaram also talks about how many people focus only on one aspect of a relationship without realizing the importance of emotional bonding. True connection comes when both partners feel valued, heard, and respected. This telugu creator conversation encourages you to move beyond surface-level thinking and build deeper understanding.
This Telugu Business Podcast style discussion brings clarity to topics that are often misunderstood or not openly discussed. Lazy Muscle continues to create content that adds real value by addressing practical life situations with honesty and simplicity.
If you want to improve your relationship, understand your partner better, and build stronger emotional connections, this short podcast clip will give you the right perspective. Watch till the end and take away a simple but powerful message: appreciation and understanding are the real strengths of any relationship.

item.title: The Testaments
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: The Testaments.

The Testaments is based on Margaret Atwood's Booker Prize-winning novel of the same name, which was published in 2019 and takes place in the dystopian theocracy of Gilead. Years after the events of The Handmaid's Tale, The Testaments is a coming of age story that finds a new generation of young women in Gilead grappling with the bleak future that awaits them. For these young women, growing up in Gilead is all they have ever known, having no tangible memories of the outside world prior to their indoctrination into this life. Facing the prospect of being married off and living a life of servitude, they will be forced to search for allies, both new and old, to help in their fight for freedom and the life they deserve.

item.title: 🚨 MEN no one will tell you this | Dr Samaram | Rohith Gollena #telugupodcast
item.description:
Have you ever questioned whether what you know about relationships, attraction, and human behavior is actually true or just something society made you believe? In this deeply engaging Telugu podcast, Rohith Gollena from Lazy Muscle sits down with Dr. G Samaram, a legendary figure in health education and social reform, to break down some of the most misunderstood topics that affect today’s generation. This is not just another conversation, this is a reality check that challenges your assumptions and pushes you to think differently.
Dr. G Samaram, former National President of the Indian Medical Association, has dedicated his life to simplifying complex medical and psychological concepts for the public. In this telugu podcast, he openly talks about men’s insecurities, women’s lack of awareness in certain areas, and the deeper reasons behind emotional disconnect in relationships. His experience of decades reflects in every answer, making this podcast not only informative but also extremely practical for real life situations.
As you watch this Best Telugu Motivation Podcast style episode, you will start connecting the dots between expectations, behavior, and reality. From understanding what is considered a limit, to exploring why people feel dissatisfied or misunderstood, this telugu doccast takes you step by step into topics that are rarely explained so clearly. It feels less like a lecture and more like a conversation that speaks directly to you.
This podcast also dives into trending and often misunderstood topics like NNN, high expectations in relationships, and the importance of hygiene between men and women. Instead of giving generic advice, Dr. G Samaram explains the psychological and physical effects behind these habits and choices. This telugu creator content is designed to remove confusion and replace it with clarity, especially for young audiences who are exposed to mixed information every day.
You will also discover how connection between partners is built, why communication often fails, and what truly matters when it comes to long-term understanding. The way Rohith Gollena drives the conversation makes it engaging, relatable, and easy to follow, even when the topics get deep. This podcast is a perfect blend of knowledge, experience, and real talk that keeps you hooked from start to finish.
Lazy Muscle continues to redefine content by bringing conversations that go beyond entertainment. This Telugu Business Podcast approach focuses on value, awareness, and transformation. Whether you are trying to improve your mindset, understand relationships better, or simply gain clarity about life, this podcast gives you insights that you can actually use.
If you are tired of half knowledge, social media myths, and confusion around sensitive topics, this episode is exactly what you need. Watch till the end because some of the most powerful insights come in the later part of the conversation. This telugu podcast is not just content, it is an experience that can genuinely shift your perspective.
Stay connected with Lazy Muscle for more such powerful podcast conversations that bring truth, clarity, and real value to your life.

item.title: TRUE💯 #telugupodcast #rohithgollena #rrrshow
item.description:
Are you truly understanding your partner, or just assuming what matters? In this insightful Telugu podcast short, Rohith Gollena from Lazy Muscle brings you a meaningful conversation with Dr. G Samaram that highlights one of the most ignored aspects of relationships today. This is not about assumptions, it is about awareness, respect, and emotional connection.
In this telugu podcast, Dr. G Samaram explains why appreciation plays a crucial role in any relationship. Many people focus only on outcomes, but forget that emotional connection, respect, and acknowledgment are the real foundations of a healthy bond. When appreciation is missing, misunderstandings grow and connection weakens. This Best Telugu Motivation Podcast segment helps you understand that small gestures and genuine respect can make a huge difference.
As the discussion goes deeper, you will realize that understanding a partner’s comfort, emotions, and needs is more important than following any fixed idea. Every individual is different, and what works for one may not work for another. This telugu Doccast emphasizes the importance of communication, patience, and mutual understanding in building a meaningful relationship.
Dr. G Samaram also talks about how many people focus only on one aspect of a relationship without realizing the importance of emotional bonding. True connection comes when both partners feel valued, heard, and respected. This telugu creator conversation encourages you to move beyond surface-level thinking and build deeper understanding.
This Telugu Business Podcast style discussion brings clarity to topics that are often misunderstood or not openly discussed. Lazy Muscle continues to create content that adds real value by addressing practical life situations with honesty and simplicity.
If you want to improve your relationship, understand your partner better, and build stronger emotional connections, this short podcast clip will give you the right perspective. Watch till the end and take away a simple but powerful message: appreciation and understanding are the real strengths of any relationship.

item.title: COMPLETE DevOps + AIOps End-To-End Project Walkthrough | Part 2 | Vishakha Sadhwani
item.description:
Complete Playlist: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLXkUFcIv0_b7rzZe0o_2-GOS2qn5-0OQy
This is Part 2 of my complete end-to-end DevOps + AIOps project series, where I’ll break down the full architecture and workflow of the project using a real-world microservices e-commerce application.
I’ve covered how seven microservices run locally with Docker Compose, how infrastructure is provisioned on AWS using Terraform, how CI/CD works with GitHub Actions, how Argo CD enables GitOps deployments, and how Prometheus + Grafana power observability.
This video is ideal for DevOps engineers, cloud learners, backend developers, and anyone who wants to understand how modern production systems are actually built.
Watch till the end, and stay tuned for Part 3, where we will focus on hands-on implementation from scratch.
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/vishakha.sadhwani LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/vsadhwani/
Subscribe to my Newsletter: https://www.tech5ense.com/

🙋‍♀️ ABOUT ME
I’m Vishakha ☁️; A Cloud Architect and DevOps enthusiast who loves turning complex cloud concepts into simple, practical insights you can actually use. You’ll find real-world projects 💻 quick explainers ☕ and honest career advice 💬; From Kubernetes and Terraform to landing roles and building your tech brand, I keep things approachable, actionable, and a little fun so learning Cloud and DevOps actually feels exciting.
If this sounds like your vibe, hit subscribe, and let’s keep growing together 🚀

item.title: You Forget This Simple Thing 😅 #telugupodcast #rohithgollena #lazymuscles
item.description:
Are you truly understanding your partner, or just assuming what matters? In this insightful Telugu podcast short, Rohith Gollena from Lazy Muscle brings you a meaningful conversation with Dr. G Samaram that highlights one of the most ignored aspects of relationships today. This is not about assumptions, it is about awareness, respect, and emotional connection.
In this telugu podcast, Dr. G Samaram explains why appreciation plays a crucial role in any relationship. Many people focus only on outcomes, but forget that emotional connection, respect, and acknowledgment are the real foundations of a healthy bond. When appreciation is missing, misunderstandings grow and connection weakens. This Best Telugu Motivation Podcast segment helps you understand that small gestures and genuine respect can make a huge difference.
As the discussion goes deeper, you will realize that understanding a partner’s comfort, emotions, and needs is more important than following any fixed idea. Every individual is different, and what works for one may not work for another. This telugu Doccast emphasizes the importance of communication, patience, and mutual understanding in building a meaningful relationship.
Dr. G Samaram also talks about how many people focus only on one aspect of a relationship without realizing the importance of emotional bonding. True connection comes when both partners feel valued, heard, and respected. This telugu creator conversation encourages you to move beyond surface-level thinking and build deeper understanding.
This Telugu Business Podcast style discussion brings clarity to topics that are often misunderstood or not openly discussed. Lazy Muscle continues to create content that adds real value by addressing practical life situations with honesty and simplicity.
If you want to improve your relationship, understand your partner better, and build stronger emotional connections, this short podcast clip will give you the right perspective. Watch till the end and take away a simple but powerful message: appreciation and understanding are the real strengths of any relationship.

BUSINESS ENQUIRIES- Contact 📧 info@ayejude.com
In this video, Aye Jude explains how India has slipped to the 6th position in global GDP rankings according to recent International Monetary Fund estimates, mainly due to the weakening rupee and currency value changes. Despite the ranking drop, India remains one of the fastest-growing major economies in the world. The video also explains the difference between Purchasing Power Parity (PPP) GDP and Nominal GDP in simple terms. Meanwhile, new statements by Donald Trump about Iran and enriched uranium have gone viral across social media and news outlets. The episode breaks down how currency value, global politics, and economic measurements are all connected. So is India really falling behind or is the full story very different from the headlines?

item.title: 🚨 BIG TWIST IN NASHIK TCS CASE | How they trapped employees using HR Data 15 Shocking Facts| VR Raja
item.description:
🚨 BIG TWIST IN NASHIK TCS CASE | How they trapped employees using HR Data 15 Shocking Facts| VR Raja
నాశిక్ TCS BPO కేసులో ఊహించని మలుపులు: నిందితుల వెనుక ఉన్న అంతర్జాతీయ నెట్‌వర్క్ ఏంటి?
For Business Inquiries & Brand Collaborations: 📧 vrfactsofficial1969@gmail.com
Ee video lo, Nashik TCS BPO case investigation lo బయటపడిన 15 అత్యంత షాకింగ్ నిజాలను విశ్లేషిద్దాం. Nida Khan అసలు HR కాదని, అది ఒక ఫ్యామిలీ క్రిమినల్ నెట్‌వర్క్ అని పోలీసులు ఎలా కనిపెట్టారు? ఆఫీస్ లోపల ఫోన్లు, లంచ్ బాక్సులను కూడా అనుమతించకుండా నడిపిన ఆ 'Parallel System' వెనుక ఉన్న మాస్టర్ మైండ్ ఎవరు?
In this detailed follow-up investigation, we uncover: 🔸 The Nida Khan Identity Crisis: Why her family claims she is innocent while the official suspension letter says otherwise. 🔸 The Parallel Office System: How senior managers ignored 78 emails and supported the harassers.
🔸 The "Fair Wife" Defense: Analyzing the bizarre logic used by Danish Sheikh’s mother to defend his actions. 🔸 Malaysia Funding Link: Why ATS and NIA are investigating illegal hawala transactions and international contacts like Imran Khan.
🔸 Undercover Operation Details: How women police officers disguised as housekeeping staff collected evidence. 🔸 MCOCA & Strict Actions: The legal consequences for the accused and the current status of the 9 registered FIRs.
Ee corporate trap gurinchi ప్రతీ ఉద్యోగి తెలుసుకోవాల్సిన అవసరం ఉంది. Video చివరి వరకు చూసి మీ అభిప్రాయాన్ని కామెంట్ చేయండి.
#VRRaja #NashikTCSCase #CorporateSafety #HumanTraffickingAwareness #InvestigationUpdate #TCSBPO #EmployeeProtection #MaharashtraPolice #NIANashik

item.title: System Design Concepts CRASH COURSE For Beginners | End-To-End DevOps + AIOps Project | Part 1
item.description:
Complete Playlist: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLXkUFcIv0_b7rzZe0o_2-GOS2qn5-0OQy
This is Part 1 of my complete end-to-end DevOps + AIOps end-to end project series, where I’ll break down the core system design principles behind modern DevOps and cloud architectures and show how they connect to the project we’ll be building.
I’ve organized these concepts into five key pillars: scalability, reliability, security, performance, and observability.
Under these pillars, I’ve covered distributed systems, microservices, APIs, service discovery, load balancing, auto scaling, Kubernetes resilience, deployment strategies, and GitOps, while explaining why each concept matters in real production environments and how it will be applied inside our AWS EKS e-commerce microservices project with CI/CD automation and an AIOps layer.
Watch till the end and stay tuned for Part 2, where I’ll break down the full architecture and workflow!
CHAPTERS: 00:00 Intro 01:18 Distributed Systems 02:57 Monolith vs Microservices 05:30 API Communication 08:36 Service Discovery 10:10 Load Balancing 13:34 High Availability 15:35 Autoscaling 17:50 Reliability with Kubernetes 19:34 Security by Design 22:27 Observability 23:49 Deployment Strategies 26:18 GitOps 28:10 Conclusion
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/vishakha.sadhwani LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/vsadhwani/
Subscribe to my Newsletter: https://www.tech5ense.com/
-----------------------------------------------
🙋‍♀️ ABOUT ME
I’m Vishakha ☁️; A Cloud Architect and DevOps enthusiast who loves turning complex cloud concepts into simple, practical insights you can actually use. You’ll find real-world projects 💻 quick explainers ☕ and honest career advice 💬; From Kubernetes and Terraform to landing roles and building your tech brand, I keep things approachable, actionable, and a little fun so learning Cloud and DevOps actually feels exciting.
If this sounds like your vibe, hit subscribe, and let’s keep growing together 🚀

In this video, Aye Jude explains reports that the United States has reached out to companies like Ford Motor Company and General Motors to assess defence manufacturing capacity. This has sparked global discussions about possible war preparations, with coverage in Turkish, European, and Indian media. Statements from U.K. military leadership have also added to the concern. Elon Musk warned that a major global conflict could emerge in the next 5–10 years. Meanwhile, Donald Trump reportedly signed a draft-related order, increasing focus on military readiness. Russia has cautioned Iran about potential escalation, while U.S. officials like Pete Hegseth have addressed the situation publicly. With industries, governments, and militaries aligning, is the world preparing for conflict or just sending a warning signal?

item.title: Islamophobia EXPLAINED by the numbers FACTS DON'T DISCRIMINATE
item.description:
follow us on X @ x.com/speaknsee follow us on Rumble @ speaknseeRumble follow us on Facebook @ https://www.facebook.com/speaknsee
Also join the Patron @ speaknsee.com website.
"The numbers don’t lie. 70% of global terrorism deaths come from just 5 countries that make up only 8% of the world’s population. Muslims are the biggest victims of Islamist violence, yet many still flee these countries only to push similar ideas elsewhere. This isn’t hate — it’s pattern recognition."
This video takes a critical look at Islamophobia, exploring why it's a topic of frequent debate and often perceived as an understandable response to recurring patterns. We discuss the data indicating that the majority of victims of islamic extremism are fellow muslims, and how this contributes to the broader social critique. Join us as we examine the complexities of religion and the implications of this phenomenon.

item.title: COMPLETE DevOps + AIOps End-To-End Project | Introduction | Vishakha Sadhwani
item.description:
Complete Playlist: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLXkUFcIv0_b7rzZe0o_2-GOS2qn5-0OQy
This video is an introduction to my very first DevOps & AI project series, where I’ll build a complete end-to-end DevOps project with AIOps integration from scratch to help you understand how AI is integrated in the DevOps workflow.
The series is divided into 4 parts:
Part - 1: System Design Foundations Part - 2: Understanding The Project Workflow Part - 3: DevOps Project Implementation Part - 4: AIOps Integration
While discussing project workflows, I’ll be covering the necessary system design foundations, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD pipelines, GitOps automation, cloud migration, monitoring, and AIOps use cases like log analysis, troubleshooting, and intelligent incident response, and also demo the complete project for you to see the final result!
This series is designed for students, DevOps engineers, cloud engineers, and software developers who want to move beyond tutorials and learn how real production systems are designed, deployed, and managed.
This can also serve as a really good resume project for 2026 DevOps jobs!
Leave a like, comment, and subscribe for more such videos.

item.title: 🚨Full Podcast out now!!! #telugupodcast #rohithgollena #lazymuscles
item.description:
Have you ever questioned whether what you know about relationships, attraction, and human behavior is actually true or just something society made you believe? In this deeply engaging Telugu podcast, Rohith Gollena from Lazy Muscle sits down with Dr. G Samaram, a legendary figure in health education and social reform, to break down some of the most misunderstood topics that affect today’s generation. This is not just another conversation, this is a reality check that challenges your assumptions and pushes you to think differently.
Dr. G Samaram, former National President of the Indian Medical Association, has dedicated his life to simplifying complex medical and psychological concepts for the public. In this telugu podcast, he openly talks about men’s insecurities, women’s lack of awareness in certain areas, and the deeper reasons behind emotional disconnect in relationships. His experience of decades reflects in every answer, making this podcast not only informative but also extremely practical for real life situations.
As you watch this Best Telugu Motivation Podcast style episode, you will start connecting the dots between expectations, behavior, and reality. From understanding what is considered a limit, to exploring why people feel dissatisfied or misunderstood, this telugu doccast takes you step by step into topics that are rarely explained so clearly. It feels less like a lecture and more like a conversation that speaks directly to you.
This podcast also dives into trending and often misunderstood topics like NNN, high expectations in relationships, and the importance of hygiene between men and women. Instead of giving generic advice, Dr. G Samaram explains the psychological and physical effects behind these habits and choices. This telugu creator content is designed to remove confusion and replace it with clarity, especially for young audiences who are exposed to mixed information every day.
You will also discover how connection between partners is built, why communication often fails, and what truly matters when it comes to long-term understanding. The way Rohith Gollena drives the conversation makes it engaging, relatable, and easy to follow, even when the topics get deep. This podcast is a perfect blend of knowledge, experience, and real talk that keeps you hooked from start to finish.
Lazy Muscle continues to redefine content by bringing conversations that go beyond entertainment. This Telugu Business Podcast approach focuses on value, awareness, and transformation. Whether you are trying to improve your mindset, understand relationships better, or simply gain clarity about life, this podcast gives you insights that you can actually use.
If you are tired of half knowledge, social media myths, and confusion around sensitive topics, this episode is exactly what you need. Watch till the end because some of the most powerful insights come in the later part of the conversation. This telugu podcast is not just content, it is an experience that can genuinely shift your perspective.
Stay connected with Lazy Muscle for more such powerful podcast conversations that bring truth, clarity, and real value to your life.

In this video, Aye Jude explains the peace talks held in Islamabad, where JD Vance and officials from Iran took part. The talks reportedly failed as Iran did not agree to some key conditions. Following this, Pakistan introduced heightened security measures, often referred to as a “Blue Book” protocol. Meanwhile, an attack near Gwadar Port involving the Baluchistan Liberation Army added to internal tensions. The video also discusses a viral social media post by Donald Trump, which drew reactions from figures like Pope Leo XIV before being deleted. With peace talks failing and tensions rising both internally and globally, what direction will this situation take next?

item.title: Can India Stop Global Wars? #telugupodcast #rohithgollena #diplomacy
item.description:
Have you ever wondered whether one country can truly influence global conflicts? In this powerful episode of the Telugu podcast, host Rohith Gollena from lazymucles sits down with major sp oberoi to discuss a bold statement made by a journalist claiming that only Prime Minister Modi has the ability to stop an ongoing war. This conversation dives deep into global politics, leadership, and India’s growing influence on the world stage.
Let’s break this down together. The journalist referenced Tucker, known to be closely associated with Donald Trump, and made an open statement that sparked curiosity worldwide. He emphasized that India stands in a unique position where it maintains neutral relationships with major global powers like Israel, the United States, and Iran. This neutrality is not common, and it opens up a new perspective on India’s diplomatic strength.
Now think about this for a second. If a country can maintain balance with multiple powerful nations, doesn’t that naturally position it as a mediator? That’s exactly what is explored in this podcast. major sp oberoi shares insights on how India’s strategic neutrality could play a crucial role in resolving conflicts and why global leaders may look towards India for mediation.
This isn’t just about politics, it’s about understanding power, influence, and decision-making at a global level. As a Telugu Business Podcast and Best Telugu Motivation Podcast, this episode connects these ideas to a broader mindset, helping viewers think beyond boundaries and understand how leadership works in real-world scenarios.
If you are someone who follows global affairs, leadership discussions, or wants to explore how India is shaping its identity as a global mediator, this telugu podcast episode is for you. Whether you are a telugu creator, a student, or someone interested in impactful conversations, this podcast brings clarity and perspective in a simple and engaging way.
Through this telugu Doccast, lazymucles continues to deliver thought-provoking discussions that go beyond surface-level content. With major sp oberoi's experience and insights, and Rotith Gollena’s engaging hosting style, this episode becomes a must-watch for anyone who wants to stay informed and inspired.
So next time when you hear about global conflicts, remember this perspective. Can India really step in as a mediator? Can leadership and neutrality reshape outcomes? Watch this podcast and decide for yourself.
This podcast, part of the growing telugu podcast ecosystem, aims to educate, inspire, and challenge your thinking. Stay tuned for more such impactful conversations from lazy muscles and keep exploring the world through meaningful discussions.

In this video, Aye Jude explains how the conflict has now stretched to over 45 days, with global attention shifting toward the Strait of Hormuz. Reports mention rising military presence in the region, including U.S. deployments like F-35 Lightning II jets and naval ships. Iran has warned that tensions in this area could push oil prices higher, with barrels already nearing $100. U.S. officials have also acknowledged concerns around nuclear materials, adding to global anxiety. Meanwhile, Russia and Iran are reportedly in discussions over handling sensitive resources. Iran’s Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi stated that goodwill will be met with goodwill, and hostility with hostility. With military build-up and diplomacy happening together, will this situation calm down or is it moving toward a larger escalation?

item.title: 🚨TRUMP BIG MISTAKE | US vs Iran : Trump's Naval Blockade India Gets Iran Oil After 7 Years | VR Raja
item.description:
🚨TRUMP BIG MISTAKE | US vs Iran : Trump's Naval Blockade India Gets Iran Oil After 7 Years | VR Raja
పాకిస్థాన్‌లో జరిగిన పీస్ టాక్స్ ఎందుకు ఫెయిల్ అయ్యాయి? ఇరాన్ మీద కోపంతో అమెరికా వేసిన Naval Blockade మాస్టర్ ప్లాన్ వర్కౌట్ అవుతుందా? వరల్డ్ ఎకానమీని షేక్ చేస్తున్న ఈ పరిణామాల వెనుక ఉన్న అసలు నిజాలు ఏంటి? For Business Inquiries & Brand Collaborations: 📧 vrfactsofficial1969@gmail.com
ఈ వీడియోలో మనం డికోడ్ చేయబోయే సంచలన విషయాలు: 🔸 ట్రంప్ vs మిలిటరీ: ప్రెసిడెంట్ ట్రంప్ అగ్రెసివ్ వార్నింగ్స్‌కి, CENTCOM అఫీషియల్ స్టేట్‌మెంట్‌కి మధ్య ఉన్న కన్ఫ్యూజన్ ఏంటి? 🔸 ఇరాన్ కౌంటర్ ఎటాక్: "మా పోర్టులకు ముప్పు వస్తే గల్ఫ్‌లో ఏ పోర్ట్ సేఫ్ కాదు" అని ఇరాన్ ఇచ్చిన వార్నింగ్ వెనుక ఉన్న మ్యాథమెటికల్ ఫార్ములా ఏంటి? 🔸 ట్రంప్ vs పోప్ (AI వార్): మతపరమైన కామెంట్స్‌తో మొదలైన గొడవ, 'Explosive Media' ఇరాన్ ఫండింగ్‌తో చేస్తున్న LEGO-style ప్రొపగాండా వార్ వరకు ఎలా వెళ్ళింది? 🔸 ఎకనామిక్ డ్యామేజ్: ఆయిల్ బ్లాకేడ్ వల్ల చైనా ఎలా ఇరుక్కుపోయింది? గోల్డ్ రేట్లు రికార్డ్ స్థాయిలో ($4,726) ఎందుకు పడిపోయాయి? అమెరికాలో Stagflation ముప్పు ఏంటి? 🔸 ఇండియాకు బిగ్ బూస్ట్: దాదాపు 7 ఏళ్ల తర్వాత అమెరికా ఇచ్చిన 30-రోజుల మినహాయింపు (Waiver) వల్ల ఇండియాలోని సిక్కా, పారాదీప్ పోర్టులకు చేరుకున్న ఇరాన్ ఆయిల్ ట్యాంకర్ల (Felicity & Jaya) కథ. 🔸 ఇస్లామాబాద్ సీక్రెట్స్: లాస్ట్ మినిట్‌లో లెబనాన్ ఇష్యూ వల్ల అమెరికా (15-పాయింట్ ప్లాన్), ఇరాన్ (10-పాయింట్ ప్లాన్) మధ్య డీల్ ఎలా క్యాన్సిల్ అయ్యింది?
#VRRaja #USIranConflict #NavalBlockade #DonaldTrump #GlobalEconomy #IndiaIranRelations #GeopoliticsTelugu #StraitOfHormuz #GoldPrices #CurrentAffairsTelugu

In this video, Aye Jude explains the recent talks in Islamabad, where JD Vance and U.S. officials met representatives from Iran. Reports suggest that Iran rejected some conditions proposed by the United States. The video also highlights concerns about sea mines in the Strait of Hormuz, a critical global oil route. Donald Trump responded on Truth Social and announced the deployment of U.S. naval forces near the region. Iran reacted sarcastically online and warned that such actions could push crude oil prices higher. Further statements suggest that Iran is unwilling to halt its nuclear program. With talks failing and military presence increasing, is this situation heading toward negotiation or a deeper conflict?

ఈ ఇన్-డెప్త్ ఎనాలసిస్ వీడియోలో మనం కవర్ చేసే అంశాలు: 🔸 బెంగాల్ ఎకానమీ: ₹7.71 లక్షల కోట్ల అప్పు మరియు ఇండస్ట్రియల్ పతనం వెనుక అసలు కారణాలు.
🔸 లెఫ్ట్ పార్టీ పతనం: 34 ఏళ్ల అధికారం నుంచి జీరో సీట్లకు పడిపోయిన CPM కథ.
🔸 SIR మాస్టర్‌స్ట్రోక్: 91 లక్షల ఓట్ల డిలీషన్ వెనుక AI వాడిన 5 కీలక రూల్స్.
🔸 మేనిఫెస్టో యుద్ధం: TMC ఇస్తానన్న ₹1500 కి ప్రతిగా BJP ప్రకటించిన ₹3000 నగదు బదిలీ పథకం.
🔸 ప్రశాంత్ కిషోర్ ఫ్యాక్టర్: PK లేని లోటు మమతా బెనర్జీని దెబ్బతీస్తుందా? 🔸 ఒపీనియన్ పోల్ 2026: మ్యాట్రిజ్ సర్వే ప్రకారం బెంగాల్‌లో మెజారిటీ ఎవరికి రాబోతోంది?
బెంగాల్ రాజకీయాలను మలుపు తిప్పబోయే ఈ చారిత్రాత్మక ఎన్నికల గురించి పూర్తి విశ్లేషణ కోసం వీడియోను చివరి వరకు చూడండి. #VRRaja #WestBengalElections2026 #MamataBanerjee #BJPBengal #SIRControversy #AIPolitics #VoterListRevision #SuvenduAdhikari #BengalEconomy #TeluguFacts

item.description:

BUSINESS ENQUIRIES- Contact 📧 info@ayejude.com
In this video, Aye Jude explains the recent talks held in Islamabad, where JD Vance and U.S. officials met representatives from Iran. Reports suggest that Iran rejected some of the conditions proposed by the United States. Meanwhile, Pakistan is said to be actively lobbying and holding backchannel talks, though miscommunication has added confusion. The video also discusses concerns about sea mines in the Strait of Hormuz. Benjamin Netanyahu released a video showing a map of multiple Middle Eastern countries, signalling continued military action. He also reinforced this stance through social media, alongside reactions from Donald Trump. With talks failing and tensions rising, is peace still possible or is the conflict set to continue longer than expected?

item.title: Jury Duty
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Jury Duty.

Jury Duty chronicles the inner workings of an American jury trial through the eyes of one particular juror, Ronald Gladden. Gladden is unaware the entire case is fake, everyone except him is an actor, including Marsden, and everything that happens — inside the courtroom and out — is carefully planned.

item.title: Star Wars: Maul - Shadow Lord
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Star Wars: Maul - Shadow Lord.

Star Wars: Maul - Shadow Lord picks up after the events of Star Wars: The Clone Wars, for a pulpy adventure that finds Maul plotting to rebuild his criminal syndicate on a planet untouched by the Empire. There, he crosses paths with a disillusioned young Jedi Padawan who may just be the apprentice he is seeking to aid him in his relentless pursuit for revenge.

item.title: The Madison
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: The Madison.

The Madison is a heartfelt study of grief and human connection following a New York City family in the Madison River valley of central Montana. It is a profound love story channeled through a deeply personal family drama about resilience and transformation. The Madison is unfolding across two distinct worlds - the beautiful landscape of Montana and the vibrant energy of Manhattan - as it examines the ties that bind families together.

item.title: 4 LEVELS Of Docker 🐳👩🏻‍💻⚙️
item.description:
Vishakha Sadhwani: 4 LEVELS Of Docker 🐳👩🏻‍💻⚙️
Learning Resources: https://gdrive.openinapp.co/12bn5
When I first started using Docker, I could run containers, build images, and follow tutorials, and I thought I was “good enough.”
But in real systems, that’s where the gaps start showing.
→ Why is your image size 2GB? → Why does one small change rebuild everything? → Why does it work locally but break in production?
That’s when I realized the importance of understanding Docker at different levels.
And moving across these levels is what actually helps you: → debug faster instead of guessing → optimize systems instead of overbuilding → understand when to use containers vs other approaches
This is the difference between “I use Docker” vs “I can design systems with it.”
If you’re serious about DevOps, this shift matters more than just learning commands.
Leave a like, comment, and subscribe for more!
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/vishakha.sadhwani LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/vsadhwani/

Microsoft Can’t Stop Breaking Windows Updates

item.title: Top 15 AWS Services You MUST KNOW 🚀
item.description:
Vishakha Sadhwani: Top 15 AWS Services You MUST KNOW 🚀
Watch the full video here: https://yt.openinapp.co/24nf2
When I started exploring AWS, the number of services honestly confused me. It felt like you needed to learn everything to build anything.
But over time, I realized, you don’t.
You only need a small set of core services, and more importantly, clarity on when to use what:
→ EC2 vs Lambda → S3 vs RDS vs DynamoDB → ECS vs EKS
That’s what actually makes the difference.
So, in this video, I’ve broken it down into 7 core key pillars I wish I had focused on earlier, along with projects that help you apply this in real-world scenarios.
This is the approach that helps you move from just learning AWS to actually building with it.
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/vishakha.sadhwani LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/vsadhwani/
Subscribe to my Newsletter: https://www.tech5ense.com/
-----------------------------------------------
🙋‍♀️ ABOUT ME
I’m Vishakha ☁️; A Cloud Architect and DevOps enthusiast who loves turning complex cloud concepts into simple, practical insights you can actually use. You’ll find real-world projects 💻 quick explainers ☕ and honest career advice 💬; From Kubernetes and Terraform to landing roles and building your tech brand, I keep things approachable, actionable, and a little fun so learning Cloud and DevOps actually feels exciting.
If this sounds like your vibe, hit subscribe, and let’s keep growing together 🚀

item.title: AAPEYANDI RAA REY 🙏🤣🤣
item.description:
#shorts #ytshorts #incogshorts #playlikeincognito #youtubeshorts
👉 DESCRIPTION: This video is made purely for fun and entertainment. In this Telugu roast, we take a light-hearted look at the Instagram personality known as Jr Sai Pallavi. The intention of this video is not to spread hate or target anyone personally.
The first half of the video is just a fun roast, but the real point of the video comes in the second half. On Instagram, many innocent creators post reels and receive negative comments. Instead of ignoring them, some people start making angry response reels and shouting at the audience, which only creates more negativity and drama.
The message here is simple: not every comment deserves a reaction. Sometimes the best thing to do is ignore the noise and keep doing your thing.
Watch till the end and let me know what you think in the comments.
If you enjoyed the video, like, share and subscribe for more funny content and Telugu roasts.

item.title: 5 GAMES to MASTER DevOps Basics 👾💥
item.description:
VIshakha Sadhwani: 5 GAMES to MASTER DevOps Basics 👾💥
If I had to start learning DevOps basics again, I’d focus on building intuition early because that’s what actually helps in real systems and interviews.
These are the games I’d play:
1. Bandit Game (https://overthewire.org/) To get comfortable with Linux commands and basic security concepts through real tasks.
2. Tynker (https://www.tynker.com/courses/python-1-jungle-run-adventure) To build programming fundamentals on Python.
3. Oh My Git! (https://ohmygit.org/) To understand essential git concepts visually, like branching, merging, commits, rebasing, and more.
4. DevOps Games (https://devops.games/) To learn CI/CD workflows and automation practically.
5. K8s Games (https://k8sgames.com/) To practice Kubernetes concepts like debugging deployments, creating clusters, and managing pods.
If you’re starting out, this is a much easier way to begin. It helps you move from watching concepts to applying them and builds practical clarity for cracking interviews and real-world work.
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/vishakha.sadhwani LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/vsadhwani/
Subscribe to my Newsletter: https://www.tech5ense.com/

I’m Vishakha ☁️; A Cloud Architect and DevOps enthusiast who loves turning complex cloud concepts into simple, practical insights you can actually use. 👉 DESCRIPTION: This video is made purely for fun and entertainment. In this Telugu roast, we take a light-hearted look at the Instagram personality known as Jr Sai Pallavi. The intention of this video is not to spread hate or target anyone personally.
The first half of the video is just a fun roast, but the real point of the video comes in the second half. On Instagram, many innocent creators post reels and receive negative comments. Instead of ignoring them, some people start making angry response reels and shouting at the audience, which only creates more negativity and drama.
The message here is simple: not every comment deserves a reaction. Sometimes the best thing to do is ignore the noise and keep doing your thing.

item.title: Learn Networking In 25 MINUTES [Crash Course] | Networking Fundamentals + Cloud Networking Concepts
item.description:
In this networking concepts crash course, I’ve broken everything down into 5 core pillars so it finally feels simple and structured instead of overwhelming.
I’ve simplified concepts like IP addressing, subnetting, CIDR, ports, protocols, the OSI model, DNS, and load balancing into clear mental models you can actually use. I’ve also connected these fundamentals to real-world systems by walking through cloud networking like VPCs, subnets, NAT, and CDNs, and then extended it to Docker networking, Kubernetes networking, service mesh, and how networking decisions impact security and performance, especially in AI workloads.
I’ve focused on helping you see how all of this actually fits together when systems are built and debugged.
Watch till the end and you’ll walk away with a clear, connected way to think about networking instead of just remembering isolated terms.
CHAPTERS: 00:00 Intro 01:26 Pillar 1 10:15 Pillar 2 14:20 Pillar 3 16:50 Pillar 4 21:04 Pillar 5 25:08 Outro

item.title: The NEW ERA Of DevOps Engineering & AI [in 2026] | Vishakha Sadhwani
item.description:
Check out Bright Data's Web MCP: https://brdta.com/vishakhasadhwani
Resources mentioned in the video + demo: https://gdocs.openinapp.co/rzr3r
In this video, I've broken down the exact updates you need to make to your skill stack to become an AI-ready DevOps engineer in 2026.
I’ve covered every foundational skill that you need, starting from Linux, Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, CI/CD, and the AI skills you must build, like understanding the ETL pipeline, Python, MLOps, GPU infrastructure, and more.
And, keep watching till the end, as there's also a live demo of my DevOps + AI workflow with Claude Code MCP!
CHAPTERS: 00:00 Intro 00:48 The Shift 02:00 Baseline Skills 04:02 AI Skills 09:55 Live Demo 15:06 Project 15:53 Career & Salary 16:25 Recap 16:43 Outro
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/vishakha.sadhwani LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/vsadhwani/
Subscribe to my Newsletter: https://www.tech5ense.com/
-----------------------------------------------
🙋‍♀️ ABOUT ME
I’m Vishakha ☁️; A Cloud Architect and DevOps enthusiast who loves turning complex cloud concepts into simple, practical insights you can actually use. You’ll find real-world projects 💻 quick explainers ☕ and honest career advice 💬; From Kubernetes and Terraform to landing roles and building your tech brand, I keep things approachable, actionable, and a little fun so learning Cloud and DevOps actually feels exciting.
If this sounds like your vibe, hit subscribe, and let’s keep growing together 🚀
-----------------------------------------------

item.title: Funny Reactions to the Current LPG/Fuel Shortage in India 😂 | Viral Comedy Moments in Telugu
item.description:
మీ బిజీ బిజీ లైఫ్ లో ఏదో కాస్త సరదా నింపాలని నా చిన్న ప్రయత్నం. This video features funny incidents and humorous moments captured during the current LPG shortage situation in India. It also includes some funny reels and comedy clips created around people’s reactions and fears about a possible fuel shortage.
The purpose of this video is purely for entertainment and light-hearted humor, showing how people are reacting creatively and humorously to the ongoing situation.
Watch till the end and enjoy these funny moments related to the LPG shortage trend.

item.title: Wait for the Twist 😅
Ludwig
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Ludwig.

Can accidental detective John 'Ludwig' Taylor crack the biggest puzzle of his life - finding his missing brother?

item.title: Welcome to Chippendales
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Welcome to Chippendales.

A sprawling true-crime saga, Welcome to Chippendales tells the outrageous story of Somen "Steve" Banerjee, an Indian immigrant who became the unlikely founder of the world's greatest male-stripping empire - and let nothing stand in his way in the process. The series details the insane, darkly comedic, crime-ridden story behind the unique male revue that became a cultural phenomenon.

item.title: The Beauty
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: The Beauty.

When international supermodels begin dying in gruesome and mysterious ways, two FBI agents are sent to Paris, Venice, Rome and New York to uncover the truth behind these deaths and end up discovering a conspiracy that threatens the future of humanity.

item.title: CIA
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: CIA.

CIA centers on two unlikely partners — a fast-talking, rule-breaking loose cannon CIA case officer, and a by-the-book, seasoned and smart FBI agent who believes in the rule of law. When this odd couple are assigned to work out of CIA's New York Station, they must learn to work together to investigate cases and criminals posing threats on U.S. soil, finding that their differences may actually be their strength.

item.title: Marshals
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Marshals.

Marshals stars Luke Grimes reprising his role as Kayce Dutton. With the Yellowstone Ranch behind him, Dutton joins an elite unit of U.S. Marshals, combining his skills as a cowboy and Navy SEAL to bring range justice to Montana. Kayce and his teammates - Pete Calvin, Belle Skinner, Andrea Cruz and Miles Kittle - must balance the high psychological cost of serving as the last line of defense in the region's war on violence with their duty to their families, which for Kayce includes his son Tate and his confidants Thomas Rainwater and Mo from the Broken Rock reservation.

item.title: 10 Military War Movies That Hit Harder Than Real Battle
item.description:
War action movies are on another level. High-risk operations, smart strategies, and enemies closing in from every side—nothing beats that kind of intensity. That’s why in today’s video we’re counting down 11 of the best intense war action movies you should definitely not miss. Let’s get started! item.title: Live, Interactive Power BI Dashboards – An Eye-Feast in Action | Power BI Training | Data Analytics
item.description:
In this session, we explore Live, Interactive Power BI Dashboards – An Eye-Feast in Action and demonstrate how Power BI transforms raw data into meaningful insights through interactive dashboards.
The session covers how filters, slicers, drill-down features, and dynamic visuals help users explore data and make better business decisions.
This session is conducted by Mr. Prashyuth, who has 13+ years of experience in the IT industry, sharing practical insights on how Power BI is used in real-world projects.
In this session you will learn:
• How interactive Power BI dashboards work • Using filters and slicers effectively • Drill-down analysis in dashboards • Building visually engaging reports • Understanding the Power BI learning path and career opportunities in Data Analytics
If you are interested in learning Power BI and building a career in Data Analytics, this session will give you a clear understanding of the possibilities.

item.title: Data to Dashboards: Power BI Live Session
item.description:
📊 Data to Dashboards – Power BI Live Session
In this session, we explored the fundamentals of Business Intelligence (BI) and how organizations transform raw data into meaningful insights using Power BI dashboards.
In today’s data-driven world, understanding how data is collected, processed, and visualized is an essential skill. Tools like Power BI help businesses turn raw data into interactive reports and dashboards that support better decision-making.
🔎 What you’ll learn in this session: • What is Business Intelligence (BI) • Benefits of BI in modern organizations • Data Collection from multiple sources • Understanding the ETL (Extract, Transform, Load) process • How raw data is converted into dashboards • Introduction to Power BI and data visualization
👨‍💻 Session conducted by an industry expert with 13+ years of IT experience, sharing practical insights from real-world projects.
📲 Want to learn more about Data Analytics & Power BI? Join our WhatsApp community for updates on upcoming sessions, learning resources, and career guidance.

item.title: Going Dutch
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Going Dutch.

In Going Dutch a decorated, hard-ass colonel is tasked with running the least important U.S. Army base in the world, located in the tulip-hugging, wine-chugging Netherlands.

item.title: All Elite Wrestling: Dynamite
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: All Elite Wrestling: Dynamite.

WarnerMedia announced today that it is partnering with All Elite Wrestling (AEW), the new professional wrestling promotion featuring a world-class roster of diverse male and female wrestlers, giving fans a new wrestling experience for the first time in 20 years. WarnerMedia and AEW together will build this powerhouse sporting league from the ground up and will begin airing weekly matches later this year. With this league, AEW is introducing a new generation of wrestlers to fans, offering fun, gripping and authentic athletic matches that will make wrestling more accessible to a broad audience.

item.title: Heated Rivalry
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Heated Rivalry.

Two hockey players must decide if there is room in their fiercely competitive world for real love.

item.title: Scrubs (2026)
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Scrubs (2026).

Old friends JD and Turk scrub in together for the first time in a long time, learning that medicine has changed; interns have changed; but their bromance has stood the test of time.

This week Microsoft updted the Office Hub app and turned it into just a Copilot app, DJI's robot Vacuum, the Romo was easily hacked, while Ring Doorbells became a privacy nightmare and Fairphone showed massive growth.

This video on Nebula: https://nebula.tv/videos/tfc-microsofts-most-unhinged-update-yet

item.title: Top 10 Chinese Action Films at Their Absolute Peak
item.description:
If you love incredible fight choreography and breathtaking stunts, you need to see the best that Chinese cinema has to offer. From legendary classics to modern hits, these movies represent the absolute highest level of martial arts action ever captured on screen. In today's video get ready for some serious adrenaline as we count down ten masterpieces you can’t afford to miss! Let's get started!
00:00 Intro 00:20 IP Man 4: The Finale (2019) 01:34 Red Cliff 2 (2009) 02:40 The Foreigner (2017) 03:43 Raging Fire (2021) 04:47 Kung Fu Killer (2008) 05:59 Cliff Walkers (2021) 07:00 Man of Tai Chi (2013) 07:58 A Writer’s Odyssey (2021) 08:56 Line Walker 2 (2019) 10:01 The Last Tycoon (2012)

item.title: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms.

A century before the events of Game of Thrones, two unlikely heroes wandered Westeros: a young, naive but courageous knight, Ser Duncan the Tall, and his diminutive squire, Egg. Set in an age when the Targaryen line still holds the Iron Throne and the last dragon has not yet passed from living memory, great destinies, powerful foes, and dangerous exploits await these improbable and incomparable friends.

item.title: Star Trek: Starfleet Academy
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Star Trek: Starfleet Academy.

Star Trek: Starfleet Academy is set in the 32nd century, a time period in the far-future of the Star Trek franchise where Starfleet and the United Federation of Planets are recovering from a cataclysmic event, as depicted in Star Trek: Discovery. It introduces viewers to a young group of cadets who come together to pursue a common dream of hope and optimism. Under the watchful and demanding eyes of their instructors, they discover what it takes to become Starfleet officers as they navigate blossoming friendships, explosive rivalries, first loves and a new enemy that threatens both the Academy and the Federation itself.

item.title: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City.

The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City takes viewers into an undiscovered world that is about so much more than religion, although the Mormon church is undeniably engrained in the culture. In the majestic mountains of Utah is a hidden social circle made up of successful women who have created their own paradise filled with luxury homes, shopping sprees and multi-million-dollar businesses and brands. With Hollywood's exclusive Sundance Film Festival in their backyards, these Type-A power-brokers are accustomed to rubbing elbows with A-listers and what party list you are on means everything. They have mastered running wildly successful enterprises by day and enjoy après ski at the finest resorts by night, all the while raising extraordinary and unconventional families. Here perfection is not an aspiration, it's a mandate. They hold themselves and each other to an extremely high standard and never hold back when things go sideways, but lord knows they are always there for each other when they need it most.

item.title: 10 Best Female-Lead Action Movies of 2025
item.description:
Female-led action movies made a massive comeback this year. Leading the game was Ballerina, a high-octane entry from the John Wick universe that dominated the global box office and was loved by fans around the world. Alongside it, we also saw several jaw-dropping releases packed with thrilling action and heart stopping stunts. Now buckle up as we count down the best female-driven action movies of 2025. Let's get started!
00:00 – Intro 00:24 – Ballerina 01:22 – G20 02:26 – Thunderbolts* 03:30 – Ash 04:30 – The Old Guard 2 05:29 – The Gorge 06:39 – Cleaner 07:28 – K-Pop: Demon Hunters 08:39 – Predator: Badlands 09:40 – Jurassic World Rebirth

item.title: Tracker
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Tracker.

Tracker features lone-wolf survivalist Colter Shaw, who roams the country as a "reward seeker," using his expert tracking skills to help private citizens and law enforcement to solve all manner of mysteries while contending with his own fractured family.

item.title: The War Between the Land and the Sea
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: The War Between the Land and the Sea.

When a fearsome and ancient species emerges from the ocean, dramatically revealing themselves to humanity, an international crisis is triggered. With the entire population at risk, UNIT step into action as the land and sea wage war.

item.title: Spartacus: House of Ashur
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Spartacus: House of Ashur.

Spartacus: House of Ashur poses the question: What if Ashur hadn't died on Mount Vesuvius at the end of Spartacus: Vengeance? And what if he had been gifted the gladiator school once owned by Batiatus in return for aiding the Romans in killing Spartacus and ending the slave rebellion?

item.title: Blue Lights
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Blue Lights.

For three police recruits in Belfast, the pressure is immense. Facing criminal gangs and divided communities, they don't know who to trust. The odds are they won't all make it.
